ranked_matches:
Here’s the ranked list of the **TOP 10 jobs** from **BEST to WORST match** for your candidate, based on skill overlap, role alignment, and location preference (prioritizing Lahore/remote-friendly roles):

---

### **1. Senior Backend Developer** at **Tether.io**
   **Match Score: 90/100**
   **Why:** Perfect alignment with **Senior Backend Engineer** and **AI/ML Backend Engineer** roles—covers **Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, REST APIs, AI/LLMs**, and cloud-native expertise.
   **Missing:** No explicit mention of **RAG** in the job description (but AI/LLMs are highly relevant).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-backend-developer-at-tether-io-4384867732)

---

### **2. Senior Backend Developer - TJ** at **Recruit AI**
   **Match Score: 90/100**
   **Why:** Identical to #1—**Senior Backend Engineer** and **AI/ML Backend Engineer** roles with **Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, REST APIs, and AI/LLMs** as core requirements.
   **Missing:** No explicit **RAG** or **cloud-native AI infrastructure** details (but AI/LLMs are a strong fit).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-backend-developer-tj-1858047-at-recruit-ai-4431573964)

---
*(Note: Two jobs from Recruit AI/Tether.io are tied at 90/100. Prioritize based on company preference or remote/hybrid options.)*

---

### **3. Join Our Cloud/K8s Talent Pool** at **Indus Valley Labs Ltd**
   **Match Score: 85/100**
   **Why:** Tailored for **Cloud-Native Backend Developer** and **Backend Engineer** roles, with **Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, Python, REST APIs, and SQL/PostgreSQL** as key skills. AI/LLMs are a **bonus** for AI-focused projects.
   **Missing:** No explicit **FastAPI** or **AI/ML backend** mention (but cloud-native + Python make it a strong fit).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/join-our-cloud-k8s-talent-pool-at-indus-valley-labs-ltd-4431924625)

---

### **4. Associate Data Engineer / BI Engineer - PostEx** at **Taraki (Lahore)**
   **Match Score: 65/100**
   **Why:** **Lahore-based** role with **PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, REST APIs, and AI/LLMs/RAG**—overlap with **Backend Engineer** and **AI/ML Backend Engineer** for data-heavy systems.
   **Missing:** Lacks **FastAPI** and **pure backend** focus (more data/BI engineering).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/associate-data-engineer-bi-engineer-postex-at-taraki-4433251446)

---

### **5. Senior Backend Developer** (Duplicate) at **Tether.io**
   **Match Score: 85/100** *(Same as #1, but listed twice in data—likely a duplicate. Skip if already applied to #1.)*

---

### **6. Senior Backend Developer - TJ** (Duplicate) at **Recruit AI**
   **Match Score: 75/100** *(Lower score due to potential ambiguity in job description. Skip if #2 is already considered.)*

---

### **7. Senior Data Engineer** at **Ciklum Pakistan (Islamabad)**
   **Match Score: 55/100**
   **Why:** **Python, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, SQL** align with backend skills, but **ETL, Spark, Snowflake, and data warehousing** are **non-core** for your profile.
   **Missing:** No **FastAPI, REST APIs, or AI/LLMs** in job description (focused on big data).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-data-engineer-at-ciklum-pakistan-4435126812)

---

### **8. Senior Data Engineer** at **Hirings Point (Lahore)**
   **Match Score: 55/100**
   **Why:** **Lahore-based**, but similar to #7—**Python/SQL** are transferable, but **ETL/Spark** are not listed in your skills.
   **Missing:** No **FastAPI, AI/LLMs, or backend API design** focus.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-data-engineer-at-hirings-point-4431516329)

---

### **9. Data Engineer I (Remote)** at **Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 55/100**
   **Why:** **Remote-friendly**, but **Snowflake/BigQuery/Spark** are not in your skills. **Python/SQL** are partial overlaps.
   **Missing:** No **FastAPI, Kubernetes, or AI/LLMs** in job description.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-engineer-i-remote-at-hire-feed-4434496507)

---

### **10. Node.js Backend Developer (Intermediate Level)** at **Recruit AI (Rawalpindi)**
   **Match Score: 40/100**
   **Why:** **Worst fit**—requires **Node.js/TypeScript** (not your stack) and is **intermediate-level**, not senior.
   **Missing:** **Python, FastAPI, AI/LLMs, and senior-level cloud skills** are irrelevant here.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/node-js-backend-developer-intermediate-level-tj-1857988-at-recruit-ai-4434995715)

---

### **Top Recommendations for Your Candidate:**
1. **Apply to #1 and #2 (Tether.io/Recruit AI)**—**90/100 match**, senior-level, and aligns with **AI/ML Backend Engineer** and **Cloud-Native Backend Developer**.
2. **Shortlist #3 (Indus Valley Labs)**—**85/100 match**, great for **Kubernetes/AWS-heavy** roles.
3. **Consider #4 (Taraki, Lahore)** if you prefer **Lahore** and can pivot to **data/BI engineering** with AI overlap.
4. **Avoid #10 (Node.js role)**—completely off-stack.

### **Pro Tip:**
- **Leverage AI/LLMs and RAG** in interviews for #1, #2, and #3 to stand out.
- If **Lahore is a priority**, #4 (Taraki) is the best local option, but #1/#2 may offer better pay/remote flexibility.
